channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Sun International warns of regulatory and market pressures from rising online gambling
item.description: Sun International has highlighted increasing regulatory risks amid the rapid growth of online gambling in South Africa. The company noted that concerns over addiction, social harm, and consumer protec...

item.title: Calls for Ending Corporal Punishment in Tanzanian Schools
item.description: Dar es Salaam – Education stakeholders for Tanzania are strongly calling for corporal punishment to be completely stopped in schools. During the International Day of Ending Corporal Punishment, expert...

item.title: Coop Bank Expands Lending to Sh101bn While Pushing Financial Inclusion in Tanzania
item.description: Cooperative Bank (Coop Bank) in Tanzania has recorded strong growth within its first year of operations, disbursing over Sh101 billion in loans as part of its wider plan to promote inclusive economic ...

item.title: Ebonyi APC Stakeholders Reach Agreement on Single Candidates for 2027 Elections
item.description: Stakeholders of the All Progressives Congress (APC) in Ebonyi State don hammer out agreement to pick one candidate for every elective position ahead of the 2027 general elections. Governor Francis Nwi...

item.title: Kenya to Host Global Forum on Diplomatic Privileges and Immunities
item.description: Kenya is gearing up to host its first ever global conference focused on the administration and management of diplomatic privileges and immunities. Scheduled for June 25-26 in Nairobi, this conference ...

item.title: Two Migrant Workers Electrocuted While Working at Brick Kiln in Kakinada
item.description: On Friday, a tragic accident occurred at a brick kiln located in Valasapakala village, Karapa mandal, Kakinada district, where two workers, including a woman, lost their lives due to electrocution whi...

item.title: Shaun Murphy Edges Past John Higgins to Reach Fifth World Snooker Final
item.description: Shaun Murphy has secured his place in the World Snooker Championship final, triumphing over John Higgins in a thrilling 17-15 comeback. Murphy was 15-13 down at the start of the final session but disp...

item.title: David Sacks Discusses Artificial Intelligence Policy and National Security
item.description: In this recent POLITICO interview, David Sacks, co-chair of the President’s Council of Advisors on Science and Technology, addresses the complex relationship between the Trump administration and leadi...

item.title: Tanzania Plans Big Expansion of Telecom Infrastructure in 2026/27 Budget
item.description: Tanzania government is planning serious investment in telecommunication infrastructure, mainly to improve access in rural and less commercially attractive areas. This comes under the Ministry of Commu...

item.title: Gauteng police rescue kidnapping victims and arrest suspects within 24 hours
item.description: Police in Gauteng acted quickly to apprehend three suspects involved in a kidnapping in Kagiso. The suspects, aged between 23 and 25, abducted a 30-year-old victim during the early hours of May 1, 202...

item.title: Exploring the Complexities of Sisterhood and Family in 'Sororicidal'
item.description: Edwina Preston's fourth novel, 'Sororicidal', presents a sharp and darkly witty exploration of family dynamics, particularly the relationships between sisters, across several decades in 20th century A...

item.title: Albanese’s Strategy to Counter Rising Support for One Nation
item.description: A year after Australians re-elected the Albanese government, support for Pauline Hanson's One Nation party has surged dramatically. In the 2022 federal election, just 6.4 per cent of Australians voted...

item.title: Bosa proposes law to enforce pay transparency and ban salary history in job offers
item.description: Build One South Africa (Bosa) has tabled a private members’ bill aimed at making the job market fairer by enforcing pay transparency and banning employers from using applicants' past or current salari...

item.title: Family Mourns Three Relatives Lost in Arusha House Fire
item.description: In Arumeru District, Arusha, deep sorrow swept through a family as they prepared to lay to rest three loved ones who perished in a house fire on April 28, 2026. The victims, grandmother Mkunde Ephata ...

item.title: EastEnders explores CPTSD through Ravi Gulati's character
item.description: Aaron Thiara, who portrays Ravi Gulati in EastEnders, has spoken about the show's recent storyline addressing mental health, particularly Complex PTSD (CPTSD). Thiara emphasises that the narrative is ...

item.title: Scheduled Kenya Power Maintenance to Affect Several Counties on April 30
item.description: Kenya Power announced a series of planned electricity outages across several counties on Thursday, April 30, as part of routine maintenance aimed at improving the stability and reliability of the nati...

item.title: KZN Bus Contract Terminated Amid Allegations of Corruption and Fraud
item.description: KwaZulu-Natal businessman Mduduzi Sithole, owner of Zululand Bus Service, claims his R6 million-a-month public transport contract was terminated because he refused to continue paying bribes to officia...

item.title: Nigerian Celebrities React to Portable's Boxing Loss Against Carter Efe
item.description: For May 1, 2026, Portable, the popular Nigerian street-hop singer, face Carter Efe for celebrity boxing match for Lagos. After three rounds, Carter Efe win the fight by unanimous decision, ending Port...

item.title: Alex Zanardi, Inspirational Athlete and Former Racing Champion, Passes Away at 59
item.description: Alex Zanardi, the legendary Italian race car driver who transformed his life after two catastrophic accidents, has passed away at 59. Zanardi, who initially rose to fame in the motorsport world by win...

item.title: Remembering the young actors of “Nang Ngumiti Ang Langit” (2019)
item.description: In 2019, the Philippine television series “Nang Ngumiti Ang Langit” captured the attention of audiences nationwide, thanks in large part to its talented child actors. The show featured young performer...
